OUR CAPABILITIES

Premium Custom Web Design & Development Services

We offer specialized website solutions optimized for loading speed, mobile usability, search engine rank, and client conversion.

01. CORE SERVICE

Custom Website Design

Tailored visual identities designed strictly from scratch. No bloated templates. We focus on layouts that tell your unique brand story, using bespoke grids, glassmorphic accents, and micro-interactions.

  • Figma-to-Code pixel perfection
  • Bespoke icons & graphic elements
  • Curated dark & light visual aesthetics

Best Suited For

Creative studios, premium brands, architects, salons, and consultants aiming to stand out.

Request Custom UI Draft

Best Suited For

Product launches, mobile apps, marketing campaigns, gym memberships, and local service ads.

Launch Landing Page
02. CONVERSION ENGINE

High-Converting Landing Pages

Designed with a single, laser-focused objective: turning paid and organic traffic into paying clients. We implement strategic psychological hierarchy, sticky CTA elements, trust badges, and fast form completion.

  • Perfect above-the-fold content hierarchy
  • Interactive booking structures (WhatsApp / Calendly)
  • Fastest CSS layout structure (zero CLS)
03. RETAIL & SALES

E-commerce Websites

Fully operational digital storefronts custom-built for scaling product sales. We integrate payment systems, product inventory management, coupon codes, and shipping notifications with secure and fast backends.

  • Secure payment gateways (Stripe, Razorpay, PayPal)
  • SEO-friendly product category markup
  • Optimized checkout flow for minimal cart abandonment

Best Suited For

Furniture shops, local brand apparel, appliance sellers, gyms offering merchandise, and restaurants.

Build Online Store
THE BENEFITS

Why WebAura Stands Out

Our engineering priorities give your brand an unfair digital advantage.

Google Lighthouse Focus

We systematically optimize image formats (WebP), remove render-blocking resources, and structure code for fast FCP scores.

Local Search Engine Ready

We build detailed local business profiles, schema graphs, maps API links, and key local landing pages to rank locally.

Accessible to Everyone

Fully screen-reader compliant using ARIA attributes, semantic headings (H1-H4), high-contrast elements, and tab focus loops.

Partner With Technical SEO Specialists

Choose high-performance code that elevates your website performance. Receive a detailed strategy call with our developers.

Get Free Consultation

WebAura builds state-of-the-art web products optimized for speed, aesthetics, and high-impact business growth.
